/usr/local/bin/c++ -O2 -pipe -march=btver1 -mtune=btver1 -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pattern_generator_tests.dir/pattern_generator_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pattern_generator_tests.dir/tests/PatternGeneratorTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pattern_generator_tests.dir/src/generation/PatternGenerator.cpp.o -o pattern_generator_tests
